name: Steam Works
description: Hissing steam valves with industrial atmosphere

prompts.SessionStart: bright ascending brass bell ringing with welcoming resonance, clean valve whistle, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SessionEnd: smooth descending brass bell with warm closing ring, clean valve sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.Stop: satisfying brass bell strike with clear bright ring and sustain, clean valve click, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PreToolUse: quick clean valve click with brief metallic tap, brass sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PostToolUse: short brass chime confirming with quick bright ring, valve click, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two brass bell tones with questioning whistle accent, valve sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady brass bell pulse with clear rhythmic tapping, valve hum, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStart: brass bell tone splitting into two parallel ringing notes, valve sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.SubagentStop: clear brass ping returning with distinct metallic ring, valve click, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright brass bell burst with energetic short whistle accent, valve sound, mechanical notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp
